sentences.arabic: قَرَّرْتُ حَجْزَ تَذْكَرَةِ طَائِرَةٍ إِلَى بَيْرُوتَ.
sentences.translation: Odlučio sam rezervirati avionsku kartu za Bejrut.
sentences.translationEn: I decided to book a plane ticket to Beirut.

sentences.arabic: فَتَحْتُ الْمَوْقِعَ الْإِلِكْتِرُونِيَّ وَبَحَثْتُ عَنِ الرَّحَلَاتِ الْمُتَاحَةِ.
sentences.translation: Otvorio sam web stranicu i potražio dostupne letove.
sentences.translationEn: I opened the website and searched for available flights.

sentences.arabic: وَجَدْتُ رَحْلَةً مُنَاسِبَةً فِي الصَّبَاحِ الْبَاكِرِ بِسَعْرٍ مَعْقُولٍ.
sentences.translation: Pronašao sam pogodan jutarnji let po razumnoj cijeni.
sentences.translationEn: I found a suitable early-morning flight at a reasonable price.

sentences.arabic: أَدْخَلْتُ بَيَانَاتِ بِطَاقَتِي الْمَصْرِفِيَّةِ وَأَتْمَمْتُ الْحَجْزَ.
sentences.translation: Unio sam podatke svoje bankovne kartice i završio rezervaciju.
sentences.translationEn: I entered my bank card details and completed the booking.

sentences.arabic: وَصَلَتْنِي رِسَالَةٌ إِلِكْتِرُونِيَّةٌ تُؤَكِّدُ الْحَجْزَ فِي الْحَالِ.
sentences.translation: Odmah mi je stigla e-poruka s potvrdom rezervacije.
